questionHtml: Draw, on the axes, a graph to show the variation with time of the height of the ball from the instant it rebounds from the floor until the instant it reaches the maximum rebound height. No numbers are required on the axes.
markschemeHtml:
concave down parabola as shown «with non-zero initial slope and zero final slope» ✓

 

Award [1] mark if curve starts from a positive time value.
Award [0] if the final slope is negative.
